Appearance

Krado OneEngineering portals. All of them. One place.

Self-hosted internal developer platform — DRM, DevX, Platform, Runbook, Cloud, Security, and Task portals in a single deployable stack.

Quick Start
View on GitHub
🚨

DRM — Incident Tracker

Manage incidents end-to-end. Track severity, maintenance windows, RCA, and resolution metrics across your entire estate.

🛠️

Platform Portal

Service catalog, tech radar, API catalog, change requests, pipeline visibility, and promotion workflows in one place.

🧑‍💻

DevX Portal

Golden paths, scorecards, dependency graphs, and operational dashboards to boost developer experience.

📋

Runbook Portal

Create and execute operational runbooks with AI-powered step selection, MCP server integration, and full execution history.

☁️

Cloud Portal

Cloud cost visibility, FinOps dashboards, resource inventory, and spend attribution across providers.

🔒

Security Portal

Compliance tracking, secrets management, vulnerability scanning, and security posture dashboards.

Built with VitePress
